arts.ttl: Arne Slot has three options to replace Trent Alexander-Arnold as Liverpool injury blow confirmed
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot confirms that Trent Alexander-Arnold will be unavailable for Thursday's EFL Cup semi-final second leg with Tottenham Hotspur due to injury.

arts.ttl: 'I don't understand' - Arne Slot calls for major squad change after 'hardest' Liverpool decisions
arts.sum: Arne Slot calls for a change to English football's match-day regulations, believing the 20-man squad rules are denying players opportunities

arts.ttl: Tottenham handed major Mathys Tel and Kevin Danso boosts ahead of Liverpool - Insider
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s two January signings Mathys Tel and Kevin Danso have both handed the club major boosts ahead of Liverpool. Tottenham are bidding to reach...

arts.ttl: ‘Hard done by’: Ashley Cole says ‘amazing’ Liverpool player is being treated unfairly right now
arts.sum: Liverpool are having an incredible season at the moment. Indeed, the Reds are flying high at the top of the Premier League, while they’ve also...

arts.ttl: Premier League refs set to make in-stadium announcements on VAR calls. Liverpool coach isn't so keen
arts.sum: Referees are set to make in-stadium announcements about the outcome of video reviews in the Premier League from the start of next season — and Liverpool manager Arne Slot isn’t a fan. The protocol is currently being trialed in this season’s English League Cup semifinals, with a first announcement coming in the first leg of Tottenham’s match with Liverpool when a goal for Spurs was ruled out for offside.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot confirms Trent Alexander-Arnold injury blow ahead of huge Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Liverpool host Tottenham at Anfield needing to overturn a 1-0 deficit from the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final clash - but there'll be no Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: Sky Sports News host hailed for Mathys Tel moment as Arsenal and Man Utd miss out
arts.sum: Sky Sports News host Nick Powell and Sky Germany's Sarah Wieczorek were lauded by fans for their unique reporting of Mathys Tel's deadline day move to Tottenham Hotspur

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Liverpool's transfer plan after dropping hint over summer deals
arts.sum: Liverpool made no new signings in the January transfer window despite also seeing a quiet summer but Arne Slot remains confident in his squad's ability to compete for the rest of the season

arts.ttl: Harry Kane shows true Tottenham colours after transfer deadline day U-turn
arts.sum: Even if he left Tottenham Hotspur to fulfil his wish of winning club silverware, Harry Kane's love for the club has never diminished. And now Tottenham's record goalscorer has sent his own well wishes to Tel after his move, speaking via his Cleats Club app.

arts.ttl: 'Jealous': Jamie O'Hara thinks Aston Villa made signing on deadline day which would've been perfect for Tottenham
arts.sum: Jamie O’Hara is more impressed with Aston Villa’s transfer activity than he is about Daniel Levy’s at Tottenham Hotspur. Both Villa and Spurs were very...
